tasks.title: Trace child reducer delegate handling
tasks.prompt: Find how the parent reducer handles delegate actions emitted by a child reducer.

baseline.problem: Progressively refined text search was needed to discover the structural relationship.

expectedSignals: parent reducer destination or child enum
associated value carrying child reducer type
file and line sufficient for one follow-up read

tasks.title: Find how child reducer state/action is wired
tasks.prompt: Identify where a child feature's state and action are integrated into its parent feature.

baseline.problem: Text search mixed construction, typealias, and enum-case evidence.

expectedSignals: clear limitation if function-body construction is required
